description_long: This object consists of three dark green industrial barrels, each with a cylindrical body and a flat, circular top. The barrels have visible horizontal reinforcement bands around their circumference, giving them a segmented appearance. The tops of the barrels feature small, round bungs or caps, likely for filling or emptying contents. The surface of the barrels appears worn and slightly scratched, suggesting outdoor or heavy-duty use. One of the barrels has a polygonal, faceted shape, distinguishing it from the other two which are perfectly round. The barrels are typically used for storing or transporting liquids such as oil, chemicals, or waste in urban or industrial environments.
description: Three dark green industrial barrels with reinforced bands and flat tops, showing signs of wear and outdoor use. One barrel is polygonal while the others are cylindrical.
description_view_0: Three barrels side by side, showing their circular tops and horizontal reinforcement bands; the polygonal barrel is on the right.
description_view_1: Barrels aligned front to back, emphasizing the polygonal shape of the front barrel and the cylindrical forms behind.
description_view_2: Rear view of the barrels, again highlighting the polygonal barrel on the left and the cylindrical barrels to the right.
description_view_3: Barrels aligned front to back from the opposite side, with the cylindrical barrel in front and the polygonal barrel at the back.
